caption: A man with a tall, grey, styled wig and glasses is recorded in a studio setting. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt, a small red and white patterned bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous small, framed photographs. To the right, clothing and items are visible on racks, including a garment with the text "LEE". On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking while looking slightly to the left of the camera. His facial expression remains focused, and his movements are minimal as he continues talking into the microphone.
